title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Caleb Writes Code and Julia Turc explain diffusion models as a process and framework rather than a fixed architecture. The video covers how diffusion can be implemented with various architectures like transformers (DiT), discussing its progression, strengths, weaknesses, and theoretical foundations.
